## LibraryRuntime.RuntimeProducedFilling.fromSource() method

Factory method for creating a RuntimeProducedFilling from a source recipe version.

**Signature:**

```typescript
static fromSource(source: IFillingRecipeVersion, scaleFactor?: number): Result<RuntimeProducedFilling>;
```
